film.title: Sooper Se Ooper
film.overview: A city guy goes to rural Rajasthan to look for his uncle.

dialogues.dialogue: Buttocks? - Yes. Buttocks. Your behind. Remove it. There is no coyness in behavior. People have become shameless. Or else everyone in the world is naked. What? Are you waiting for the right time?

If you are lying... - Let him go ahead and lie. Let him lie. Hey... - We will make him reach there. To Thakur. If you have shame......do go ahead and put your thumb impression... - No, no, don't do that. Even I am standing here. Hey, hey, don't be scared. Don't be scared. Put the impression. Come on.

See, uncle Bhairav. - Yes, dear. One minute. Where is the speaker and the curtains? Where is everything? What...Presenting to you the pride of Rajasthan. And the future actress. Gul, Gule, Gulistan. Gulabo aka Gul.
